[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111 4
1 1000001 2
2 0100001 2
3 0000000 a
4 1010010 3
5 1101010 4
6 1111011 6
7 1000001 2

01 10 0101100 3
12 21 1001110 4
23 32 1100000 2
34 43 0100001 2 match 2

67 76 0111101 5
70 07 1010111 5
